prompt: Get basic info about this YouTube video using only the oEmbed endpoint (no yt-dlp): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ

assertions.text: Output or method used the oEmbed endpoint (youtube.com/oembed or noembed) rather than yt-dlp
Output contains the video title (Rick Astley - Never Gonna Give You Up)
Did not fall back to yt-dlp when user explicitly asked for oEmbed only
